name: agent-stage-core
description: TypeScript stage frame decoder and playback runtime for public agent-stage frames.

scripts.test:dist: node -e "await import('./dist/stage-frame.js').then((m) => { if (typeof m.decodeStageFrame !== 'function') throw new Error('decodeStageFrame export missing') }); await import('./dist/stage-manager.js').then((m) => { if (typeof m.StageManager !== 'function') throw new Error('StageManager export missing'); if (typeof m.parseStageAssetDirectory !== 'function') throw new Error('parseStageAssetDirectory export missing') }); await import('./dist/reference-renderer.js').then((m) => { if (typeof m.createReferenceRenderer !== 'function') throw new Error('createReferenceRenderer export missing'); if (typeof m.describeReferenceRenderState !== 'function') throw new Error('describeReferenceRenderState export missing') }); await import('./dist/sanitize.js').then((m) => { if (typeof m.sanitizePublicPayload !== 'function') throw new Error('sanitizePublicPayload export missing') })"
